title: Interface arrays always connect to ports in high:low order

features.name: interface array port with low-to-high indexing
features.description: Code should include an interface array module port declared with low-to-high index ordering (e.g., [0:2])
features.snippet:
interface intf(); integer index; endinterface
module subm(intf y[0:2]); endmodule

features.name: interface array signal with high-to-low indexing
features.description: Code should include an interface array signal declared with high-to-low index ordering (e.g., [2:0]) in parent module
features.snippet:
interface intf(); integer index; endinterface
module t(); intf test_intf[2:0](); endmodule

features.name: mismatched interface array index ordering connection
features.description: Code should include connection between interface arrays with reversed index orderings (high:low to low:high)
features.snippet:
interface intf(); integer index; endinterface
module subm(intf y[0:2]); endmodule
module t(); intf test_intf[2:0](); subm_inst s(.y(test_intf)); endmodule
